content.en:
The original bamboo forest on the other side.

Ruin Rock Mountains.

Purple Mist on the other side.

Ye Tian and the Lord of Mystery and other other shore-level geniuses directly passed through these three treasure lands and continued to move forward.

Soon, they came to an abyss.

This is also the last area of this treasure land.

The abyss is as black as ink, and even the will of the Origin Realm can't probe deep.

One by one, the other side level geniuses stood outside the abyss, and they did not step into it for the first time.

"I'll go down and see what's going on. "

Ye Tian took the initiative to propose.

"Then thank you Endless Lord!" thanked the Lord of Mystery.

......

Wow!

Ye Tian directly entered this abyss.

Suddenly, he seemed to have lost contact with the outside world, and he could no longer perceive the existence of the Lord of Mystery and their existence.

Of course, he didn't continue to care, and continued to go deep into this abyss.

Soon, a pitch-black creature that exuded wisps of origin aura attacked him.

【Abyssal Origin Beast】

This is the name that the Replication Talent found on this creature.

The strength of this abyssal origin beast is not weak, it is about equivalent to an ordinary nine-stage bone transformation realm genius, he is holding the origin rule weapon spear, and killing the opponent in one shot is very easy.

But soon.

He found that there were more and more Abyssal Origin Beasts here, and they all came to attack him.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian held the spear, the Origin Rule weapon, and constantly attacked these Abyssal Source Beasts.

One Abyssal Origin Beast after another was slain by him.

These Abyssal Origin Beasts were just a little annoying to him, and they didn't pose any threat.

He continued to go deeper.

Almost all of these abyssal source beasts' nests come from the nests on the stone walls of the abyss, and these nests are equivalent to voids.

Ye Tian entered these nests to see if he could find some good things.

Soon.

He found that a piece of black metal had been bred in each of the nests, and this black metal contained very powerful energy and the breath of the Origin.

Even if Ye Tian didn't know it, he knew that the value of this ferrous metal was not ordinary.

Of course.

Its value is not too high, after all, every nest here has this black metal, which is not rare.

He did not intend to explore the entire abyss thoroughly, but quickly returned.

......

Beyond the abyss.

Ye Tian is back.

"Lord of Endless, what is the situation of this abyss?" asked the Lord of Mystery curiously.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian told the general situation of this abyss, and then took out the piece of black metal.

"Abyss Black Gold!"

The Lord of the Mystic and the Lord of the Dragon Lizard are well-informed and recognize them at a glance.

"What is the use of black gold in the black abyss?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Lord of Mystery introduced, "Abyssal Black Gold can be used to craft the best Origin Rule weapons, and it is very valuable, and it is very popular in the central part of the country. "

Although the Abyss Black Gold was not of much help to cultivation, its high value also attracted these other side level geniuses.

Thereupon.

They are about to enter the abyss, which is worth the risk, even if it is dangerous.

Subsequently.

The Lord of Mystery and they followed Ye Tian into this abyss.

As soon as they entered this abyss, they were soon attacked by the Abyssal Source Beast.

These other shore-level geniuses can be combined into battle formations, but they can also deal with a large number of Abyssal Source Beasts.

Like the Lord of the Dragon Lizard, they even have the strength to kill the Abyssal Source Beast.

Of course.

Ye Tian's strength was the strongest, and he was able to easily slaughter one Abyss Origin Beast after another.

Then, they entered one lair after another, scraping the black gold of the abyss.

As time passed, they found more and more abyssal black gold.

And the abyssal beasts that they killed were also increasing.

The deeper they went into the abyss, the more Abyssal Source Beasts they encountered, and some of the Abyssal Source Beasts were very strong, including the Abyssal Source Beasts that were no less than the Lord of the Dragon Lizard.

Fortunately, Ye Tian's strength was strong enough to be able to kill such an abyssal source beast.

Otherwise, their group of other shore-level geniuses would definitely be besieged and killed here.

After some time, they came to the bottom of the abyss.

Here, they saw an incomparably terrifying creature awaken from its slumber.

【Abyssal Black Gold Beast】

This abyssal black gold beast even brought a hint of threat to Ye Tiandu.

"Lord of Mysteries, retreat!"

Ye Tian reminded.

And the Lord of Mystery also sensed the danger for the first time, and when she was stared at by the gaze of this abyssal black gold beast, she felt that her whole body was frozen, and she didn't even have the strength to resist.

She knew very well that if she encountered this creature, she would definitely be killed by it in an instant, and she would not even have a chance to resist.

"Push!"

One by one, the other side level geniuses retreated.

Even the Lord of the Dragon Lizard retreated, not daring to contend with this abyssal black gold beast.

......

"Endless Golden Arm!"

Ye Tian's endless golden arm held the spear, the weapon of the Origin Rule, and cast the Origin Rule of the other side, integrated into the spear, and also blessed a magic technique on the other side-the Golden Mang, which can increase the attack power a little.

Break!

The spear instantly hit the body of the Abyss Black Gold Beast.

Dang!

His Origin Rule weapon, the spear, was bounced off, and his attack only left a trail on the Abyssal Black Gold Beast, not even breaking its defenses.

"What a terrifying defense!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

He could sense that this abyssal black gold beast had the aura of abyssal black gold, it should have devoured a lot of abyssal black gold, and this abyssal black gold could also refine its body, so that its body became stronger and stronger.

Now, this abyssal black gold beast's physical defense is almost invincible, but its speed is a little slower.

Ye Tian can't help it now, but it can't help Ye Tian either.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian could only temporarily hold back this abyssal black gold beast and let the dragon lizard lord collect treasures at the bottom of this abyss.

......

"Lord of Mystery, Lord of Endless has dragged that abyssal black gold beast, and a few of us have gone to find the treasure. "

The Lord of the Dragon Lizard.

"Good!"

The Lord of Mystery nodded.

Subsequently.

The lord of the dragon lizard, they are looking for treasures at the bottom of the abyss.

In a short time, they found a large amount of Abyssal Black Gold, the amount of which was very exaggerated.

And, they also found something special.

Somewhere in the void at the bottom of the abyss, they found a large number of resources, all of which were incomparably precious resources, growing here one by one.

Subsequently.

They took all these resources away.

After a period of time, the abyss black gold here was all excavated by them, and only then did they inform Ye Tian to leave.

"Lord of Endless, the treasure is in hand, you can leave!"

The Lord of the Dragons messaged.

Ye Tian stopped fighting with this abyss black gold beast and left quickly.

And this abyss black gold beast also tried to intercept Ye Tian and prevent him from leaving, but he was thrown away after a while.

After all, the speed of this abyssal black gold beast was still too slow, not comparable to Ye Tian's speed. ~
